noDurableFieldsReason: FU01C adds no durable BattleState fields; accepted evidence reuses production BattleSubjectKind generic route subject variants, existing BattleEntrypointTrace route events, and adapter qRoute projection. Marked-transfer and condition-immunity rows now route through generic non-durable reducer subjects instead of duplicating active-effect state.
